Modified: head/math/py-networkx/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/py-networkx/Makefile	Sun May 26 14:31:30 2013	(r319112)
+++ head/math/py-networkx/Makefile	Sun May 26 14:52:24 2013	(r319113)
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

-PORTVERSION=	1.6
+PORTVERSION=	1.7

 		CHEESESHOP
